transactions.desc: Meneses was sent outright to Triple-A Las Vegas on Monday.
Go was optioned to Triple-A St. Paul on Monday, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The Marlins recalled Brzykcy from Triple-A Jacksonville on Monday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Burgos from Triple-A Reno on Monday.
The Diamondbacks optioned Abner to Triple-A Reno on Monday.
The Padres recalled Duran from Triple-A El Paso on Monday.
The Cubs designated Pomeranz for assignment Monday, Patrick Mooney of The Athletic reports.
The Tigers optioned Valencia to Triple-A Toledo following Sunday's game against the Orioles.
The Cubs activated Taillon (hamstring) from the 15-day injured list Monday, Patrick Mooney of The Athletic reports.
The Orioles designated Martin for assignment Monday.
The Orioles selected Tromp's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
The Astros activated Sousa (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Monday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Colorado Rockies traded RHP Seth Halvorsen to the Los Angeles Dodgers.
The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Nick Frasso to the Colorado Rockies.
The Los Angeles Dodgers traded OF Landyn Vidourek to the Colorado Rockies.
The Astros activated Blanco (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Monday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Astros optioned Delgado to Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Mets optioned Wagaman to Triple-A Syracuse on Monday.
The Mets reinstated Robert (back) from the 60-day injured list Monday. He'll start in center field and bat seventh in the Mets' series opener in Milwaukee.
The Dodgers optioned Hurt to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Monday.
The Phillies optioned Rangel to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Monday.
The Phillies recalled McFarlane from Double-A Reading on Monday.
The Twins optioned Gray to Triple-A St. Paul on Monday.
The Twins activated Buxton (hip) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Rays optioned Englert to Triple-A Durham on Saturday.
The Yankees optioned Rodriguez to Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Monday.
Celesten was promoted to Double-A Arkansas on Sunday, Adam Jude of The Seattle Times reports.
The Angels reinstated Campero (hand) from the 10-day injured list and optioned him to Triple-A Salt Lake on Sunday.
The Mets outrighted Short to Triple-A Syracuse on Sunday.
The Astros optioned King to Triple-A Sugar Land after Sunday's 5-2 loss to the Orioles, Matt Kawahara of the Houston Chronicle reports.
